title: Aligner
description: Fixes the weird graphical glitch that causes lines to appear when hovering the crosshair above a block in 1.21.11+ with MojoLauncher and LTW
body:
# What it does

Fixes the weird graphical glitch on 1.21.11+ for MojoLauncher on Android devices with the LTW renderer which causes weird graphical lines to appear when you higlight a block. 

![Before](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ccc8aeaacebedbb50c0ad719ca60645caad533c4.jpeg)
![After](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ca08b030895a1f5caa3886ab1d9a99b8c802897a.jpeg)

Note: only works on MojoLauncher with LTW. The main developer is [ArtDeell](https://github.com/artdeell/) who is also the owner of [MojoLauncher](https://github.com/MojoLauncher/MojoLauncher). If you want to support his projects you can donate him [here](https://boosty.to/artdeell/single-payment/donation/710722/target).
